extra.title: New public method `currentUserName()` has no test coverage
extra.body: The new public method `currentUserName()` was added without any corresponding test in the diff. This method reads from UserDefaults and force-unwraps the result, which introduces multiple execution paths (key exists vs. doesn't exist) that should be tested.
extra.suggested_action: Add tests that verify `currentUserName()` returns the correct username when the key exists and handle the case when the key is missing.
